    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class applicationMain.FoundationsMain
    Launches the JavaFX application.
    markDeleted() - Method in class entityClasses.Post
    Marks the post as logically deleted.
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Max allowed length for post bodies.
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Reply
    Maximum number of characters allowed in a reply body.
    MAX_TITLE_LENGTH - Static variable in class entityClasses.Post
    Max allowed length for post titles.
    Model - Class in guiUserLogin
    Holds model support for the login screen.
    Model - Class in guiUserUpdate
    Holds model support for the user update screen.
    Model() - Constructor for class guiUserLogin.Model
    Creates the login model object.
    Model() - Constructor for class guiUserUpdate.Model
    Creates the user update model object.
    ModelAddRemoveRoles - Class in guiAddRemoveRoles
    Holds model support for the add/remove roles screen.
    ModelAddRemoveRoles() - Constructor for class guiAddRemoveRoles.ModelAddRemoveRoles
    Creates the add/remove roles model object.
    ModelAdminHome - Class in guiAdminHome
    Holds model support for the admin home screen.
    ModelAdminHome() - Constructor for class guiAdminHome.ModelAdminHome
    Creates the admin home model object.
    ModelFirstAdmin - Class in guiFirstAdmin
    Holds model support for the first-admin setup screen.
    ModelFirstAdmin() - Constructor for class guiFirstAdmin.ModelFirstAdmin
    Creates the first-admin model object.

    Holds model support for the multiple-role dispatch screen.

    ModelNewAccount - Class in guiNewAccount
    Holds model support for the new account screen.

    Creates the new-account model object.
    ModelPostManagement - Class in guiPostManagement
    Stores post data used by the discussion board screens.
    ModelPostManagement() - Constructor for class guiPostManagement.ModelPostManagement
    Creates the post management model object.
    ModelReplyManagement - Class in guiReplyManagement
    Stores reply data used by the reply screens.
    ModelReplyManagement() - Constructor for class guiReplyManagement.ModelReplyManagement
    Creates the reply management model object.

    Holds model support for the role 1 home screen.
